titleStmt.title: SII 37.245: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 245. (A.R. No. B 351 of 1940-41.) Nemaḷḷadinne, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up infront of the Vishnu temple.
This is dated Śaka 1480, Kāḷayukti, Pushya śu. 2, corresponding to 1558 A.D., December 11, Sunday.

It registers the remission made by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Tirumalarājayyadēva Mahārāju of the several taxes on the barbers of the village Nēmalidinne situated in the Avukusīma, similar to the remission made to the barbers in his realm by the king at the request of Koṇḍōju.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh; Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 256.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1480 Agunēṭi kāḷayukti saṁvatsara puṣya śu 2 lu . śrīma
nmahārājādhirājarājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadā
śivarāyadēvamahārāyalugāru vijayanagaramaṁdu va
jra śiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhivisāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāja tirumalarājayyadēvama
hārājuluṁgāru Avuku śīmalōni namilidiṁnna maṁggaḷa
vōjulaku Iccina dharmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu śrīsadāśi
vadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru vijayanagaramaṁddu maṁggaḷa
koṁḍōjurāyasiṁhāsanāku cellē śīmala nallānu
maṁggaḷlavōjarikālu peṭṭēpaṁnnu kānike kaṭnaṁ Asaveccaṁ doṁmari
paṁnnu sidhāyaṁ veṭṭivēmulu sarvvamānyālugānu dharmaśāsa
naṁ Iccina prakārāna māku cellēnu Avuku śīmalōni namilidiṁnna maṁgga
ḷavōjulaku kānikekaṭnaṁ veṭṭivēmulu doṁmaripaṁnnu siddhāyaṁ paṁ
nnu sa sarvvamānyālugānu Istimi . Ācaṁdrārkkastāyigānu Isti
mi Iṁduku yavaru tappikoṁnnānu tallitaṁḍḍila vāraṇāśini ku
ttikalu kōśina pāpālapōduru . gaṁggāvatilōnu gaṁgegōvunu caṁ
ppina pāpānapōduru . śunakamāṁssaṁsuraśēviṁccinapā
pāna pōduru .
Digital edition of SII 37.245 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
